title: mariottia goebeliana
intro: Mariottia goebeliana, also known as "Gebeliana," is a rare and endangered plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. Mariottia goebeliana has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although the effectiveness and safety of these preparations are not well-documented and require further research.
